description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Docker that allows manual dispatch with an optional version input. The workflow runs on ubuntu-22.04 and consists of two jobs: build-and-push-kiwix-tools and build-and-push-kiwix-serve. The first job builds and publishes the kiwix/kiwix-tools Docker image using openzim/docker-publish-action, while the second job depends on the first and builds and publishes the kiwix/kiwix-serve Docker image with similar settings.
